claim_bullets.bullet_text: true and false are value types. (raw/javascriptallonge.pdf p.94-95)
The ! operator negates boolean values. (raw/javascriptallonge.pdf p.94-95)
The && operator performs logical AND on boolean values. (raw/javascriptallonge.pdf p.94-95)
The || operator performs logical OR on boolean values. (raw/javascriptallonge.pdf p.94-95)

source_record_text: true and false are value types in JavaScript, as described in 'JavaScript Allongé'.
